name: Shenzhen Hopewind Electric Co., Ltd.
summary: Shenzhen Hopewind Electric Co., Ltd. engages in the research and development, manufacture, sale, and service of renewable energy and electric drive products. It offers wind power generation systems, such as doubly-fed converters, full power converters, medium voltage wind power converters, main control electric systems, pitch control systems, and liquid cooling systems; solar power systems, including C and D inverters, central inverters, PV string inverters, inverter room and box-type transformer integrated machines, solar water pump inverters, and photovoltaic accessories, as well as integrated solutions of photovoltaic generation; and modular control, variable frequency, and industry customized drive products; and wide frequency domain grid and low-voltage ride-through simulation systems. The company also provides static var generators; shore power supply products comprising low-voltage, and medium and high voltage supply products. Its products are used in metallurgy, petroleum, chemical, subway, telecommunication, automobile manufacturing, papermaking, electric vehicle, and other various industrial applications. Shenzhen Hopewind Electric Co., Ltd. is headquartered in Shenzhen, China.
